sa:items.rdfs:label: .45 Falcon Pistol
sa:items.sa:description: An efficiently manufactured, reliable in use, cheap to buy and easy to get a hold of pistol.

sa:items.rdfs:label: 10mm Autocannon
sa:items.sa:description: A rotary cannon capable of sustained rapid fire. Favored by military forces and combat drone operators for its balance of firepower and reliability.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Can be mounted on a shoulder or arm slot in power armor or drones with hardpoints

sa:items.rdfs:label: 10mm Automatic Rifle
sa:items.sa:description: The standard issue assault rifle for modern military forces. Reliable, accurate, and adaptable for mounting on combat platforms. Countless variants exist across different cultures.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Can be mounted on a shoulder or arm slot in powered armor or drones with hardpoints

sa:items.rdfs:label: 10mm Hellfire Autocannon
sa:items.sa:description: An upgraded rotary cannon with enhanced fire rate and damage output. The 'Hellfire' designation reflects its devastating capability and the scorching heat of sustained fire. Typically reserved for elite units.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Can be mounted on a shoulder or arm slot in power armor or drones with hardpoints

sa:items.rdfs:label: 10mm Snub gun
sa:items.sa:description: A big cluncky revolver. If it does not work, you can always hit him with it.

sa:items.rdfs:label: 2mm Automatic Rifle
sa:items.sa:description: A lightweight assault rifle firing small caliber rounds at high velocity. Popular among scouts and mobile units who prioritize speed over raw damage. Efficient ammunition consumption makes it economical.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Can be mounted on a shoulder or arm slot in powered armor or drones with hardpoints

sa:items.rdfs:label: 2mm Mini-Autocannon
sa:items.sa:description: A compact rotary cannon optimized for drone and power armor integration. Delivers continuous suppressing fire without excessive weight penalties. Maintenance is straightforward in field conditions.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Must be mounted on shoulder or arm slot in power armor or drone hardpoints.

sa:items.rdfs:label: 2mm SubMachine gun
sa:items.sa:description: A handheld rapid-fire weapon designed for close-quarters engagements. Compact and easy to wield, though accuracy suffers at extended ranges. Preferred by boarding teams and urban combat specialists.

sa:items.rdfs:label: 40 MM Selectable Shell Propeller SSP-40 Thumper
sa:items.sa:description: A versatile 40mm grenade launcher capable of loading different shell types. The 'SSP-40' designation refers to its selectable shell propulsion system. Powerful against armor but limited ammo capacity.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Ignores 1 DR and 5 hardness

sa:items.rdfs:label: 40mm Recoilless cannon
sa:items.sa:description: A shoulder-mounted recoilless cannon platform that accepts various munitions. Effective for specialized roles, including anti-armor and support fire. The absence of recoil makes it suitable for power armor mounting.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Can be mounted on a shoulder slot in powered armor or on drones with hardpoints

sa:items.rdfs:label: 80 MM Selectable Shell Propeller, SSP-80 Pulverizer
sa:items.sa:description: The larger cousin of the Thumper, the 'Pulverizer' is a devastating 80mm launcher designed for extreme firepower. Heavy enough to require mounting on combat platforms, it lives up to its name when unleashed.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Ignores 1 DR and 8 Hardness

sa:items.rdfs:label: Cold laser
sa:items.sa:description: A laser weapon that projects frigid energy rather than heat. Effective at freezing targets and creating environmental hazards. Often preferred in close quarters where heat-based weapons pose risks.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Brr.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Concusser
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Can be mounted on shoulder or arm hardpoints.Half damage against targets protected by mage armor or similar armor spells
sa:items.sa:description: Fires highly focused points of gravity tearing at the soft flesh hiding in the hard steel.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Dual 10mm Autocannon
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Can be mounted on a shoulder or arm slot in power armor or drones with hardpoints
sa:items.sa:description: A tripod moutned dual autocannon. Will shred most of everything at the price of hundreds of expensive bullets at the click of a button

sa:items.rdfs:label: Dual 10mm Hellfire Autocannon
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Can be mounted on a shoulder or arm slot in power armor or drones with hardpoints
sa:items.sa:description: A tripod moutned dual autocannon. Will shred most of everything at the price of hundreds of expensive bullets at the click of a button

sa:items.rdfs:label: Ez Shoot shotgun
sa:items.sa:description: An easy handle and operate semi automatic shotgun

sa:items.rdfs:label: Ez Shot Pistol
sa:items.sa:description: A small and easy to handle pistol with little recoil

sa:items.rdfs:label: Flame thrower
sa:items.sa:description: A portable incendiary projector that engulfs targets in flame. Effective area denial weapon. The psychological impact is often as important as the actual damage. Heavily regulated in civilian areas.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Targets in area save vs your ranged ability dc for half damage

sa:items.rdfs:label: Heavy gatling laser
sa:items.sa:description: A heavy energy weapon using rotary optics to deliver sustained laser fire. Capable of melting through obstacles and armor. Power requirements limit its use to military forces and well-equipped operators.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Can be mounted on a shoulder or arm slot in power armor or drones with hardpoints

sa:items.rdfs:label: High Pressure Flamer
sa:items.sa:description: An upgraded flame projector using pressurized fuel systems to achieve greater range and intensity. Designed for power armor integration. Creates devastating infernos in confined spaces.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Can be mounted in powerarmor hardpoints. Targets in affected area save vs your ranged ability dc for half damage

sa:items.rdfs:label: Holdout plasma pistol
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: On a natural 1 it misfires and needs 1 additional round to cool of before it can be fired again.
sa:items.sa:description: A relativly small weapon that lets a combatant without powerarmor realisticly inflict damage on a powerarmor wearing target.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Light gatling laser
sa:items.sa:description: A compact energy weapon delivering consistent laser fire with minimal weight. Ideal for drone platforms and combat suits where weight is a concern. Efficient power consumption extends operational range.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Must be mounted on shoulder or arm slot in power armor or drone hardpoints.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Light Laser rifle
sa:items.sa:description: A precision energy rifle optimized for accuracy and efficiency. Quieter than ballistic alternatives and leaves minimal trace. Popular with special operations teams and covert operatives.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Can be mounted on a shoulder or arm slot in powered armor or drones with hardpoints

sa:items.rdfs:label: Magus rifle
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Counts as magic for overcoming damage reductiong and penetrating magical defences
sa:items.sa:description: Heavily enchanted elven assaultrifle

sa:items.rdfs:label: Missile launcher
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Can hit targets that are not in your line of sight if target linked ally has line of sight to target and a clear path to the target exists and the patch contains no turns tighter than 45 degrees. No turn on the missiles path can be less than 10 squares apart.
sa:items.sa:description: A missile launcher system intended for easy to move artilliery like support

sa:items.rdfs:label: Naridon Marksman Rifle
sa:items.sa:description: A precision long-range weapon built for accuracy and lethality. The Naridon is favored by military snipers and assassins alike. Its high critical modifier and scoped design make it devastating in trained hands.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Scoped

sa:items.rdfs:label: OT Shoulder firing tube
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: A one time launcher for Ultralight rockets. Roll attack as usual, ignore spread in bombard description.
sa:items.sa:description: A single use rocket launcher

sa:items.rdfs:label: PDW Submachine gun
sa:items.sa:description: A hightech submachine gun. Noisy but effective

sa:items.rdfs:label: Plasma spear
sa:items.sa:description: An exotic weapon projecting superheated plasma in the shape of a spear. Designed for extreme close-quarters combat, it carves through armor and flesh with equal ease. Requires power armor mounting for safe use.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Mounts on powerarmor hardpoints

sa:items.rdfs:label: Polaris HIL Cannon
sa:items.sa:description: The Polaris HIL (High Intensity Laser) Cannon delivers devastating sustained energy beams. Mounted on military-grade power armor, it's a statement of force. Few targets survive direct engagement with this weapon.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Mounts on shoulder, arms and other hardpoints.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Railgun
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Ignores 3 DR and 10 Hardness. Draw a line between attacker and target. Everything in front of the attacker withing 20 ft of the line takes 2d6 sonic damage that ignores all hardness.
sa:items.sa:description: A tripod-mounted kinetic accelerator that fires projectiles at hypersonic velocities. The sheer force punches through virtually any defense, leaving a path of destruction in its wake. Reserved for military installations and extreme threats.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Rocket launcher
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Roll attack as usual, ignore spread in bombard description
sa:items.sa:description: A multiple use rocket launcher

sa:items.rdfs:label: Shotgun, auto
sa:items.sa:description: A semi-automatic shotgun with rapid-fire capability. Devastating in close quarters, the spread of buckshot makes precision unnecessary. Popular with law enforcement and urban combat specialists.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Half maximum range. Can not cause criticals outside range. DR and Hardness is doubly effective against shotguns

sa:items.rdfs:label: shotgun, combat
sa:items.sa:description: A combat-oriented shotgun designed for tactical operations. Lighter than its automatic cousin, it sacrifices rate of fire for portability and handling. Favored by special forces and boarding teams.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Half maximum range. Can not cause criticals outside range. DR and Hardness is doubly effective against shotguns

sa:items.rdfs:label: Sliver submachine gun
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Specialization 1 xp You inflict 2d4 bleed damage when you damage a biological target with a burst attack using at least 2 damage dice using sliver submachine guns
sa:items.sa:description: A small compact machinegun. Its magazine is a spool of tungsten wire which is snipped of in needlelike pieces before being launched.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Tight focus plasma cannon
sa:items.sa:description: An advanced plasma weapon using optical focusing arrays to concentrate superheated plasma into a narrow beam. Each hit degrades target armor and defenses, making it effective against heavily armored opponents.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Mounts on shoulder, arms and other hardpoints. For each hit against a target reduce ac by 1 and hardness by 2. This effect can be removed by conducting repairs.

sa:items.rdfs:label: XS-1 Plasma dispenser
sa:items.sa:description: A precision plasma rifle designed for extreme range engagement. The 'XS-1' designation refers to its extra-small discharge profile combined with extraordinary range. A weapon for specialists with steady hands.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Scoped.
